creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jacula      2010-08-03 13:45:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/kbdscan         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    misc/kbdscan/files   LICENSE-kbdscan 
  Log:
  kbdscan is a small program to set the FreeBSD console keyboard in
  raw scancode mode and show scancodes of keys pressed and released.
  
  Five seconds of inactivity resets the console to the original mode
  and quits the program.
  
  WWW: http://hack.org/mc/hacks/kbdscan/
  
  PR:             ports/146010
  Submitted by:   Eitan Adler <EitanAdlerList@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    pgj (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.957     +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/misc/kbdscan/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/misc/kbdscan/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/misc/kbdscan/files/LICENSE-kbdscan (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/misc/kbdscan/pkg-descr (new)
